products.name: Saunova 2.0 Built-In
products.short_description:
The Saunova 2.0 Built-In combines the control panel and power controller in same package. It has a modern and stylish look, and now with more flexible installation possibilities. The control remembers your personal settings, such as session time and temperature, allowing to have consistent sauna experience.

The control uses smart technology which automatically shuts off heating elements when set temperature has been reached. When temperature goes down, it wakes up the necessary heating elements. Not only this keeps the temperature steady but makes the heating element lifespan longer and saves energy!

The control casing has more room in it for the electrician to work with, which makes installation easier than ever! Flexible wiring options with strain relief provision on 4 sides, including the back part for wiring to be completely hidden.

products.name: Saunova 2.0 PLUS
products.short_description: Our new smart sauna control unit, the Saunova 2.0 PLUS, gives the user even more freedom of use. The control unit includes Wi-Fi connectivity, meaning that it can be controlled via the SAWO app. The app allows for a more customized sauna experience and remote control of multiple sauna functions, such as temperature and lighting. With real-time monitoring, the app user gets instant access to the current sauna temperature and session time.  The Saunova 2.0 PLUS comes with an intuitive user interface that can be placed inside or outside the sauna room. Engineered for Ni2 and NS heaters of up to 9,0kW, the Saunova 2.0 PLUS can also be extended to n18,0kW with a contactor unit.
features: Remote control: Set schedule and control the heater from anywhere and any distance.
Intuitive interface: Use the app and controls with ease, thanks to our streamlined UI/UX design.
Integrated controls: All control settings can be managed through one platform: the smart control or the mobile app.
Real-time monitoring: Get instant access to the current sauna temperature and session time.
Safety: Heaters automatically turn off when the timer reaches zero.

products.name: Saunova Simple
products.short_description: Experience hassle-free sauna operation with the Saunova Simple (SAU-UI-S). Designed for those who prefer simplicity, this compact controller lets you easily turn your sauna heater on and off, allowing you to focus on pure relaxation. Suitable for all NS heaters until 9kW. Heaters over 9kW require separate Saunova Contactor Unit.
features: For those looking for simplicity on sauna controlling.

products.name: Saunova 2.0 Contactor Unit
products.short_description:
The Saunova 2.0 Contactor Unit (SAU-PS-V2) connects to the Saunova 2.0 Power Controller, enabling reliable control of NS sauna heaters rated over 9kW. Designed for high-powered sauna configurations, it delivers a safe and efficient solution for installations that exceed standard power requirements.

The modernized casing provides additional internal space for easier and faster installation. Flexible wiring options with strain relief provisions on all four sides — including the rear panel — allow cables to be completely hidden, ensuring a clean and professional finish.

Use with NS Heaters over 9kW. Connect with Saunova Power Controller

products.name: Innova Classic
products.short_description:
Separate control unit
Innova Classic control unit consists of a separate control panel and a power controller which can handle power up to 15 kW. It is packed with features such as door sensor, pre-timer, smart energy-saving, and steady and even power distribution! It has a clear LED-display and seven buttons for easy use. Temperature sensor with over-heat fuse and 4 m connection cable are included in the package.

Separate Innova Contactor Unit is required when heater power is exceeding 15 kW.

Built-in control unit
Innova Classic built-in control unit consists of a power controller with an integrated control panel. It is equipped with the same features same as the Innova Classic separate control unit. The only difference is that all comes in one neat package!

Separate Innova Contactor Unit is required when heater power is exceeding 15 kW.

products.name: Taurus D NS
products.short_description:
Taurus D revolutionizes the standard sauna heater by having two or more power options in the same heater. The heater is designed for industrial use, spas, and both public and private pools.

The Taurus D features an advanced sensory system that detects heating element malfunctions early. The stone container keeps the sauna stones apart from the heating elements, increasing the lifespan of the elements. Also, the heater features a cassette pull-out tray that makes any maintenance function simple, whether replacing the stones or the elements. This design reduces downtime and operational costs while ensuring long-term performance.

products.name: Helius NS
products.short_description:
The Helius delivers increased placement flexibility with its slim profile. This “hidden” heater can be installed behind the benches using a wall divider, which effectively renders the heater invisible. Once water is poured into the water basin, which is the only element that remains visible, the water then travels into the heater via a hose, heating up the room. With its advanced airflow design, the Helius uses fewer stones, which leads to better airflow and better heating efficiency.

The Helius also requires a much shorter than usual safety distance (min. 5mm). If the separate Helius hood is added, the safety distance can be made almost minimal.
